name: Yaeger Dorulumon

signature_move.name: Weiß Spirale
signature_move.description: Pierces any enemy with theSturm Stinger.

description: An evolution of Dorulumon that became able to walk on two legs. It has taken the appearance of a knight equipped with the gigantic, drill-shaped spear " Sturm Stinger " and its slash-and-defend dual-use " Zasshu Shield ". Its ability for single-point penetration is the best, and because of this distinctive characteristic, it leads single-unit charges on its enemies to break open escape routes for those behind it to follow. Its Special Moves are piercing any enemy with the Sturm Stinger ( Weiß Spirale ), and tearing them to pieces with the Zasshu Shield ( Schwarz Nagel ).
